description: Static tool catalog for the isolated LangGraph agent console.

tools.name: Git status
tools.description: Show the short working tree status for the current repository.

tools.name: Git log
tools.description: Show the most recent commits in compact one-line form.

tools.name: Git diff
tools.description: Show unstaged changes in the working tree.

tools.name: Git diff staged
tools.description: Show staged changes that are ready to commit.

tools.name: Git branch list
tools.description: List local and remote branches.

tools.name: Git checkout branch
tools.description: Switch the working tree to an existing branch.

tools.name: Git create branch
tools.description: Create and switch to a new branch.

tools.name: Git pull rebase
tools.description: Fetch and rebase the current branch onto its upstream.

tools.name: Git commit all
tools.description: Commit tracked changes with a supplied commit message.

tools.name: Git push
tools.description: Push the current branch to its configured upstream remote.

tools.name: GitHub repo view
tools.description: Inspect repository metadata with the GitHub CLI.

tools.name: GitHub PR list
tools.description: List open pull requests for a repository.

tools.name: GitHub PR create
tools.description: Create a pull request from the current branch.

defaults.title: Agent workflow update
defaults.body: Generated by the LangGraph agent console.

tools.name: GitHub PR checkout
tools.description: Check out a pull request locally.

tools.name: GitHub PR checks
tools.description: View checks for the current or selected pull request.

tools.name: GitHub issue list
tools.description: List repository issues by state.

tools.name: GitHub workflow run
tools.description: Trigger a GitHub Actions workflow by name or file.

tools.name: GitHub release create
tools.description: Create a GitHub release for a tag.

defaults.title: v0.1.0
defaults.notes: Release generated by the LangGraph agent console.

tools.name: GitLab repo view
tools.description: Inspect project metadata with the GitLab CLI.

tools.name: GitLab MR list
tools.description: List GitLab merge requests by state.

tools.name: GitLab MR create
tools.description: Create a GitLab merge request from the current branch.

defaults.title: Agent workflow update
defaults.description: Generated by the LangGraph agent console.

tools.name: GitLab pipeline list
tools.description: List recent GitLab CI pipelines.

tools.name: GitLab issue list
tools.description: List GitLab issues by state.

tools.name: GitLab release create
tools.description: Create a GitLab release for an existing tag.

defaults.name: v0.1.0
defaults.notes: Release generated by the LangGraph agent console.

tools.name: AWS caller identity
tools.description: Show the active AWS account, ARN, and user identity.

tools.name: AWS S3 list
tools.description: List S3 buckets or objects at a bucket URI.

tools.name: AWS S3 sync upload
tools.description: Sync a local directory to an S3 prefix.

tools.name: AWS S3 sync download
tools.description: Sync an S3 prefix to a local directory.

tools.name: AWS CloudFront invalidate
tools.description: Create a CloudFront invalidation for one or more paths.

tools.name: AWS EC2 describe instances
tools.description: Describe EC2 instances in the active region.

tools.name: AWS Lambda list functions
tools.description: List Lambda functions in the active region.

tools.name: AWS Lambda update code
tools.description: Update a Lambda function from an S3 object.

tools.name: AWS ECS list services
tools.description: List ECS services in a cluster.

tools.name: AWS CloudWatch logs tail
tools.description: Tail a CloudWatch Logs group.

tools.name: AWS CloudFormation describe stacks
tools.description: Describe CloudFormation stacks in the active region.

tools.name: AWS SSM get parameter
tools.description: Read a Systems Manager Parameter Store value.

tools.name: Terraform init
tools.description: Initialize Terraform providers and backend metadata.

tools.name: Terraform fmt check
tools.description: Check Terraform formatting recursively without rewriting files.

tools.name: Terraform validate
tools.description: Validate Terraform configuration syntax and provider schemas.

tools.name: Terraform plan
tools.description: Create a Terraform execution plan.

tools.name: Terraform apply
tools.description: Apply a saved Terraform execution plan.

tools.name: Terraform state list
tools.description: List resources in Terraform state.

tools.name: Terraform output
tools.description: Read Terraform outputs as JSON.

tools.name: npm install
tools.description: Install package dependencies and update lock files when needed.

tools.name: npm ci
tools.description: Install dependencies from package-lock.json for repeatable builds.

tools.name: npm test
tools.description: Run the project test script.

tools.name: npm run build
tools.description: Run the project build script.

tools.name: npm run lint
tools.description: Run the project lint script.

tools.name: npm audit
tools.description: Audit installed dependencies for known vulnerabilities.

tools.name: npm publish
tools.description: Publish the current package to the configured npm registry.

tools.name: GitHub issue create
tools.description: Create a GitHub issue with a title and body.

defaults.title: Agent task
defaults.body: Created by the LangGraph agent console.

tools.name: GitHub release view
tools.description: View release metadata for a GitHub tag.

tools.name: GitHub workflow list
tools.description: List GitHub Actions workflows for the repository.

tools.name: npm view package
tools.description: Read npm package metadata from the configured registry.

tools.name: npm outdated
tools.description: Show outdated npm dependencies.

tools.name: npm pack
tools.description: Create a tarball from the current npm package.

tools.name: npm run script
tools.description: Run a named npm script.

tools.name: Docker ps
tools.description: List Docker containers.

tools.name: Docker build
tools.description: Build a Docker image from a Dockerfile context.

tools.name: Docker run
tools.description: Run a Docker image with a container name.

tools.name: Docker logs
tools.description: Read recent logs from a Docker container.

tools.name: Docker Compose up
tools.description: Start Docker Compose services in detached mode.

tools.name: Docker Compose down
tools.description: Stop Docker Compose services.

tools.name: Docker exec
tools.description: Run a command in a running Docker container.

tools.name: Docker image prune
tools.description: Prune dangling Docker images.

tools.name: kubectl current context
tools.description: Show the active Kubernetes context.

tools.name: kubectl get pods
tools.description: List Kubernetes pods in a namespace.

tools.name: kubectl get deployments
tools.description: List Kubernetes deployments in a namespace.

tools.name: kubectl describe pod
tools.description: Describe a Kubernetes pod.

tools.name: kubectl logs
tools.description: Read recent logs from a Kubernetes pod.

tools.name: kubectl rollout status
tools.description: Check rollout status for a deployment.

tools.name: kubectl rollout restart
tools.description: Restart a Kubernetes deployment rollout.

tools.name: kubectl apply
tools.description: Apply Kubernetes manifests from a file or directory.

tools.name: kubectl diff
tools.description: Preview Kubernetes manifest differences.

tools.name: kubectl scale deployment
tools.description: Scale a Kubernetes deployment replica count.

tools.name: pytest
tools.description: Run Python tests with pytest.

tools.name: ruff check
tools.description: Run Ruff lint checks.

tools.name: ruff format check
tools.description: Check Python formatting with Ruff.

tools.name: mypy
tools.description: Run mypy type checks.

tools.name: pip install requirements
tools.description: Install Python dependencies from a requirements file.

tools.name: python module run
tools.description: Run a Python module with optional arguments.

tools.name: uv sync
tools.description: Sync Python project dependencies with uv.

tools.name: poetry install
tools.description: Install Python project dependencies with Poetry.

tools.name: make test
tools.description: Run a Makefile test target.

tools.name: make build
tools.description: Run a Makefile build target.

tools.description: Run a Makefile lint target.
